rows.name: Data breach via compromised dependency

risks.description: A malicious npm/pip/go module in our dependency tree exfiltrates secrets or source code
Supply chain attack via build pipeline tampering

rows.mitigation_strategy: SBOM generation on every build; SCA scanning with daily cadence; pinned dependency versions; SLSA Level 3 build provenance; runtime egress monitoring; vendor security scorecards reviewed quarterly

rows.name: Payment processing outage

risks.description: acme-payment unavailable during Black Friday peak
Card network (Visa/MC) API rate limit hit during burst

rows.mitigation_strategy: Active-active deployment across 2 regions; circuit breaker around card network calls; backlog buffer with exponential retry; on-call rotation 24/7 during peak; PagerDuty escalation policy EP-ACME-PLATFORM-ONCALL

rows.name: Traffic scaling beyond capacity

risks.description: 4x normal Black Friday traffic overwhelms catalog read replicas
Cache stampede when hot SKU cache TTL expires

rows.mitigation_strategy: Pre-emptive autoscaling with 2x headroom; Redis cache TTL jitter to prevent stampede; read replica burst capacity of 8x baseline; load tested at 6x peak in October 2026 rehearsal

rows.name: Critical dependency abandonment

risks.description: A key upstream library (e.g. BullMQ, FastAPI) loses active maintenance
Elasticsearch licensing change forces migration to OpenSearch

rows.mitigation_strategy: Quarterly dependency health review; vendor lock-in scorecard; abstraction layers for swap-prone deps (Elasticsearch behind acme-search query interface); fork-and-pin contingency plan for critical libs

rows.name: Security patch deployment lag

risks.description: Critical CVE in nginx/istio/pg not patched within 7-day SLA
Blue/green deployment fails during emergency patch

rows.mitigation_strategy: Automated CVE feed into Jira; bypass normal release calendar for critical severity; rehearsed 4-hour emergency patch procedure; rollback verified monthly

rows.name: Third-party API rate limit / outage

risks.description: Stripe / SendGrid / Twilio outage during peak hours
FedEx / UPS / DHL API quota exhaustion

rows.mitigation_strategy: Multi-vendor fallback for every critical external dependency; circuit breakers with graceful degradation; rate-limit monitoring with alerting at 70% budget consumption; SLA-tracked vendor scorecards

rows.name: Database unavailability / data loss

risks.description: Postgres primary failure in single region
Cross-region replication lag causing read-after-write inconsistency

rows.mitigation_strategy: Multi-AZ RDS with 15-second automated failover; cross-region read replica with lag monitoring; PITR with 35-day retention; write-protected role for app user; all DDL via Alembic; weekly backup restore drill

rows.name: Compliance audit failure

risks.description: SOC2 Type2 audit finds control gap
GDPR data subject access request not fulfilled within 30-day SLA
PCI-DSS scope expansion due to improper tokenization

rows.mitigation_strategy: Quarterly internal compliance audit; DSAR self-service portal with automated fulfillment; automated PCI scope assertion via iptables egress verification; evidence collection automated into audit bundle
